description: Shared type definitions for Design Tokens, based on DTCG 2025.10 stable specification. Defines scalar value types (color, dimension, duration, etc.) and composite value types (border, shadow, typography, etc.) used by token and resolver records.

colorValue.description: A color value expressed in a specific color space with optional alpha and hex fallback. Float components are stored as strings because the atproto data model does not support floating-point numbers.

components.description: Color component values (positional, depending on colorSpace). Each element is a string-encoded float (e.g. '0.4', '1.0') or the string 'none'.

alpha.description: Opacity as a string-encoded float between '0' and '1'. Assumed '1' if omitted.

dimensionValue.description: A dimension with a numeric value and CSS-compatible unit. The value is a string-encoded float because atproto does not support floating-point numbers.

value.description: The numeric magnitude as a string-encoded float (e.g. '16.5', '100', '0.25').

durationValue.description: A duration with a numeric value and time unit. The value is a string-encoded float because atproto does not support floating-point numbers.

value.description: The numeric magnitude as a string-encoded float (e.g. '150', '300.5').

cubicBezierValue.description: A cubic Bezier curve defined by exactly 4 control-point string-encoded floats (x1, y1, x2, y2).

numberValue.description: A numeric value encoded as a string (e.g. '42', '3.14159'). Encoded as string because atproto does not support floating-point numbers and cannot distinguish integer from float at the type level.

fontFamilyValue.description: A font family name or comma-separated fallback string.

strokeStyleValue.description: Stroke style properties (dash array, line cap/join, miter limit). Corresponds to DTCG 'strokeStyle' composite type. Dash lengths and miter limit are string-encoded floats.

dashArray.description: Dash and gap lengths as string-encoded floats.

lineCap.description: Shape at the end of open subpaths.

lineJoin.description: Shape at the corners of paths.

miterLimit.description: Maximum miter length when lineJoin is 'miter', as a string-encoded float.

borderValue.description: A composite border value combining width, line style, and color.

transitionValue.description: A composite transition value with duration, delay, and timing function.

timingFunction.description: Timing function as a cubic Bezier curve.

shadowValue.description: A composite shadow value (drop shadow / box-shadow) with color, offsets, blur, spread.

inset.description: Whether the shadow is inset (inner shadow).

gradientValue.description: A composite gradient value with type and color stops.

angles.description: Angle values in degrees as string-encoded floats.

colorStop.description: A single gradient color stop. Position is a string-encoded float.

position.description: Stop position as a string-encoded float (0-1 for proportional, or unitless percentage like '50').

typographyValue.description: A composite typography value aggregating font family, weight, size, line metrics, and text transforms. Numeric values are string-encoded floats to accommodate the atproto data model.

fontFamily.description: Ordered list of font family names (primary and fallbacks).

lineHeight.description: Line height as a string-encoded unitless multiplier (e.g. '1.5', '1.2').
